title: Tips & Shortcut
description: Tips, trik, dan keyboard shortcut di terminal macOS.

commands.name: keyboard-shortcuts
commands.title: Keyboard Shortcuts Terminal
commands.examples:
# Ctrl+R lalu ketik kata untuk mencari di history
# Tab completion: ketik sebagian lalu tekan Tab
# Cmd+D untuk split pane di iTerm2

commands.name: oh-my-zsh
commands.title: Oh My Zsh
commands.examples:
# Install Oh My Zsh
sh -c "$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh/master/tools/install.sh)"

# Edit ~/.zshrc
ZSH_THEME="agnoster"
plugins=(git node npm docker brew macos)

source ~/.zshrc
commands.notes: Plugin populer: git, docker, brew, macos, zsh-autosuggestions, zsh-syntax-highlighting.

commands.name: useful-tricks
commands.title: Tips Berguna macOS
commands.description: Trik dan tips untuk produktivitas di terminal macOS.
commands.examples:
caffeinate -t 3600  # Cegah sleep 1 jam
say "Build complete"  # Text-to-speech
screencapture -c  # Screenshot ke clipboard
screencapture -T 3 screenshot.png  # Delayed screenshot
pmset displaysleepnow  # Matikan display
sudo purge  # Bersihkan RAM cache
open -a Calculator  # Buka app
commands.notes: caffeinate sangat berguna saat menjalankan proses panjang.
